# Pull Request

## What does this PR do?

A clear, specific description. One or two sentences.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (typo, broken link, factual correction)
- [ ] Content addition (new skill, archetype, playbook, example, reference)
- [ ] Content refinement (rewriting or improving existing content)
- [ ] Documentation (README, CONTRIBUTING, CREDITS, CHANGELOG)
- [ ] Infrastructure (gitignore, templates, plugin.json)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Related issue

Closes #_____ (if applicable).

For substantive content additions, an approved issue should exist first. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Voice and quality checklist

For content additions and refinements:

- [ ] My writing matches the existing voice: direct, opinionated, specific, no hype.
- [ ] I cite real-world references (brands, typefaces, studios) where relevant.
- [ ] I acknowledge trade-offs honestly rather than presenting opinions as universal truths.
- [ ] I haven't added promotional links to my own products/services.
- [ ] If I used AI to draft anything, I edited it substantially to meet the bar.

## Verification

- [ ] I tested any code examples (they compile / run / render).
- [ ] I followed the file format conventions (frontmatter for SKILL.md, etc.).
- [ ] Links work.
- [ ] No `.DS_Store`, `node_modules/`, or other artifacts committed.

## Additional context

Anything reviewers should know before reading. Screenshots welcome for visual changes.

---

*By submitting this PR, I agree that my contribution is licensed under the MIT license that covers the project.*
